name: Happy Christmas Elf
subject: holidays/elf
prompt: a cheerful Christmas elf standing with hands on hips, a tall pointed hat with a fluffy pom-pom, pointed ears, a tunic with a wide belt and big buttons, striped stockings, and curly-toed shoes, a big friendly smile

name: Cute Easy Elf
subject: holidays/elf
prompt: a very simple chubby cartoon elf with a round body, big round eyes, a small pointed hat, mitten hands, and tiny boots, drawn with thick bold simple shapes for little hands, waving hello

name: Elf in Santa's Workshop
subject: holidays/elf
prompt: a busy elf working at a wooden workbench in Santa's toy workshop, hammering a wooden toy, shelves of finished toys behind, a hanging lantern, scattered tools and wood shavings on the bench

name: Elf Wrapping Gifts
subject: holidays/elf
prompt: a happy elf wrapping a present, holding a roll of ribbon, tying a big bow on a square gift box, more wrapped boxes and a spool of ribbon stacked around its feet, a content smile

name: Elf Building a Toy
subject: holidays/elf
prompt: an elf carefully assembling a wooden toy train on a workbench, holding a small screwdriver, a stack of toy blocks and a teddy bear nearby, tongue poking out in concentration

name: Elf with a Candy Cane
subject: holidays/elf
prompt: a joyful elf holding a giant striped candy cane taller than itself, leaning on it like a staff, a pointed hat tilted to one side, curly-toed shoes, a few peppermint candies scattered at its feet

name: Shelf Elf Sitting
subject: holidays/elf
prompt: a mischievous little elf sitting on the edge of a shelf with its legs dangling, long pointed shoes, hands resting on the shelf edge, a sly grin, a small framed picture and a candle on the shelf beside it

name: Girl Elf with Bow
subject: holidays/elf
prompt: a sweet girl elf in a pointed hat with a big bow, two braided pigtails, a flared skirt with a holly trim, striped stockings, curly-toed shoes, holding a small gift, a cheerful smile

name: Baby Elf with Stocking
subject: holidays/elf
prompt: an adorable baby elf peeking out of a large hanging Christmas stocking, only its head and mitten hands showing over the top, big sparkly eyes, a tiny pointed hat, the stocking trimmed with fluffy cuff

name: Elf Face Close-Up
subject: holidays/elf
prompt: a close-up of a smiling elf face filling the frame, large pointed ears, rosy round cheeks, big friendly eyes, the bottom edge of a pointed hat with a pom-pom on top, a small holly sprig tucked behind one ear

name: Elf on a Sleigh
subject: holidays/elf
prompt: an excited elf riding in a curvy decorated sleigh loaded with wrapped presents, holding the reins, a tall pointed hat streaming back, a few snowflakes and a swirl of motion lines around the sleigh

name: Elf Coloring Maze Activity
subject: holidays/elf
prompt: a cheerful elf standing on one side of a simple winding path that leads to a pile of presents on the other side, holly leaves and small stars decorating the corners, the path drawn as an easy maze for kids to trace
